Web search results for query: "CSS masonry "display masonry" vs "grid-template-rows masonry" debate 2025 2026"

Links: [{"title":"Masonry layout - CSS - MDN Web Docs","url":"https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/Guides/Grid_layout/Masonry_layout"},{"title":"Feedback needed: How should we define CSS masonry? | Blog | Chrome for Developers","url":"https://developer.chrome.com/blog/masonry-syntax"},{"title":"Masonry layout - CSS | MDN","url":"https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/CSS_grid_layout/Masonry_layout"},{"title":"Masonry Layout is Now grid-lanes | CSS-Tricks","url":"https://css-tricks.com/masonry-layout-is-now-grid-lanes/"},{"title":"Masonry In CSS: Should Grid Evolve Or Stand Aside For A New Module? — Smashing Magazine","url":"https://www.smashingmagazine.com/2025/05/masonry-css-should-grid-evolve-stand-aside-new-module/"},{"title":"CSS Masonry Layout: Native Grid Support","url":"https://www.sitepoint.com/css-masonry-layout-native-grid/"},{"title":"Masonry Layout is Now grid-lanes","url":"https://cpanelplus.net/masonry-layout-is-now-grid-lanes/"},{"title":"CSS Masonry & CSS Grid | CSS-Tricks","url":"https://css-tricks.com/css-masonry-css-grid/"},{"title":"CSS Only Masonry Layouts with Grid","url":"https://fjolt.com/article/css-grid-masonry"},{"title":"CSS Grid Lanes (Masonry Layout) Is Here: A Complete Guide for 2026 - DEV Community","url":"https://dev.to/bean_bean/css-grid-lanes-masonry-layout-is-here-a-complete-guide-for-2026-4686"}]

Based on the search results, here's what I found about the CSS masonry syntax debate in 2025-2026:

## The Debate Resolved: Grid-lanes Won

The CSS Working Group resolved to reuse grid templating and placement properties for masonry layout as of January 31st, 2025, and setting grid-lanes on the display property activates a masonry layout.

## The Two Competing Approaches

The debate centered on two competing syntaxes:

1. **`grid-template-rows: masonry`** - Mozilla and WebKit favored the grid-template-rows: masonry extension of existing grid, which is what Firefox and Safari have shipped behind flags.

2. **`display: masonry`** - The display: masonry version creates new opportunities and a simpler syntax.

## Why Grid-lanes Won

The CSS Working Group combined the two CSS masonry proposals into one draft specification with the hope that this would make it easier to compare the two and make a final decision.

## Current Browser Status

As of early 2026, CSS Grid Lanes is available in Safari 26 (first to ship), with Chrome and Firefox having the feature behind experimental flags and expected to ship stable support later in 2026.

## Alternative Proposal: Item Flow

In March 2025, Apple's WebKit team proposed Item Flow, a new system that unifies concepts from Flexbox, Grid, and masonry into a single set of properties, with Item Flow merging their strengths and replacing flex-flow and grid-auto-flow with a shorthand called item-flow.
